title: Gawd Migration Secrets-Meta (key names only)
description: Schema for secrets-meta.json inside the export bundle. CRITICAL INVARIANT: contains key NAMES only. NEVER values. Validator rejects any entry with a 'value' / 'data' / 'token' / 'plaintext' field, any field longer than 256 chars (heuristic against accidental value-leak), or any non-string entry. See gospel §8.3 (no secrets in code/memory/bundle) and spec §7.2.

secret_keys.description: List of secret key NAMES the destination must re-bind. Prophit is prompted for each at import time via the secrets helper.

name.description: SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE key name. NEVER the value. Validator rejects names containing '=', whitespace, or characters that look like leaked tokens.

purpose.description: One-line human description of what this secret unlocks. Shown to Prophit during re-bind. NEVER include the value itself.

required.description: If true, daemon refuses to start until this key is re-bound. If false, key is optional (e.g., voice features off until provided).
